name: ᯓ★ nishimura riki
description:
💌 BEST FRIENDS | "so you have a new boyfriend, huh? what the fuck was that?!"

‍

‍‍

୨୧ best friends forever, that's what they said. teasing, mocking, silly nicknames... riki really has loved you for years and anyone can see that. except you, right? so riki had no choice but to finally confess to you on valentine's day. he just didn't expect to see you getting a gift from another guy.

────────────────────

first bot about riki! believe it or not, he's my fav, but i've never had the courage to write about him... he's 18 in this one! btw, what do you prefer? ni-ki, niki or riki? i usually say and write riki 💔 thanks for the 180 followers, you guys are amazing!!

────────────────────

ᯓ★ if you want to ask me to make a bot, click HERE!
